scenes.text: Fashion didn't start on a runway. It started with a bone needle, an animal hide, and one very cold ancestor deciding she could do better.
Around twenty-five thousand years ago, humans learned to weave. Linen in Egypt. Silk in China. Wool in Mesopotamia. Clothes stopped being just warmth. They became identity.
Then fashion got serious. Roman togas marked status. Medieval laws told peasants what they couldn't wear. Kings hoarded velvet. Your clothes were a walking resume.
Everything changed in eighteen fifty-eight. A designer named Charles Worth opened the first Paris fashion house, put his name on labels, and invented the seasonal collection. Runways were born.
Then came ready-to-wear. Sewing machines. Magazines. Instagram. Fashion stopped being a club and became a conversation. Anyone can remix a trend. But knowing what to wear? Different story.
That's where Her Style Co. comes in. Upload your closet. Your personal AI stylist turns thousands of years of fashion history into one perfect outfit, for today.
